audit_items.proof_trace: action.c contains zero kmalloc/kzalloc/vmalloc calls; no heap memory is allocated in this file. The only resource acquisitions are refcounted kernel objects (ip_route_output_key and ipv6_dst_lookup_flow in nfp_fl_set_tun), both released immediately after use via ip_rt_put/dst_release on all success paths, before any subsequent error returns. All other structures are pre-allocated by callers or stack-allocated.
